family_summary: Standalone bundle for the Siege of Leningrad, with direct bombardment episodes split from the wider starvation and deprivation catastrophe. Bundle start is set to the opening direct-fire window on 4 September 1941; the formal land siege began on 8 September 1941.
notes: The formal siege lasted from 8 September 1941 to 27 January 1944, but the bundle starts on 4 September to capture the opening bombardment phase documented by the direct-mortality source base. Starvation and deprivation mortality are excluded from the baseline direct path.
